top_signals.title: Conservative network has law protecting U.S.-flag shipping in its sights
top_signals.summary:
With the Jones Act temporarily suspended, the political action network backed by conservative billionaire Charles Koch wants the law protecting U.S.-flag shipping repealed.

top_signals.title: Einride begins trading on Nasdaq after completing de-SPAC
top_signals.summary:
Einride began trading on Nasdaq after completing its de-SPAC. The company is scaling both electric trucks and cabless autonomous vehicles.

The post Einride begins trading on Nasdaq after completing de-SPAC appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: U.S. natural gas storage capacity increased slightly in 2025
top_signals.summary: Underground working natural gas storage capacity in the Lower 48 states increased slightly in 2025, according to our latest data, with growth concentrated in the South Central and Mountain regions. Underground natural gas storage provides a source of energy when demand increases, balancing U.S. energy needs. We calculate natural gas storage capacity in two ways: demonstrated peak capacity and working gas design capacity. Both increased in 2025.
